summary: Iteration 33 - Fresh Meal Systems Ops Center Tab Complete. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Ops Center is the default tab, live indicator with auto-refresh toggle, 6 Production KPI cards, Active Runs with progress bars, Lane Utilization with status indicators, Delivery/Subscription/Channel Mix sections, all 11 tabs present.
critical_code_review_comments: ops-dashboard endpoint correctly aggregates data from all FMS MongoDB collections
Production section includes in_progress, scheduled, paused counts with active_runs array (limited to 10)
Lane utilization correctly computes status: overloaded (>100%), busy (>70%), available (>0%), idle (0%)
Delivery section aggregates routes, stops, distance, cost, and cold_chain_routes
Subscriptions section includes by_plan breakdown with subscribers and meals counts
Alerts are properly sorted by severity (critical > urgent > warning)
Frontend Ops Center tab is correctly set as default tab (useState initialized to 'ops-center')
Auto-refresh interval set to 15 seconds with toggle control
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing TEST_FMS_* prefixed data from iteration 32
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33 verified the new Ops Center tab in Fresh Meal Systems. Key features: GET /api/fresh-meals/ops-dashboard endpoint returns aggregated real-time data. Frontend Ops Center tab (data-testid='ops-center-tab') is the default tab with live indicator, auto-refresh toggle (15s interval), 6 Production KPI cards, Active Runs section (data-testid='ops-run-{id}'), Lane Utilization section (data-testid='ops-lane-{id}'), Delivery/Subscription/Channel Mix cards. Tab button is data-testid='fms-tab-ops-center'. All 11 tabs now present (Ops Center + original 10).

ops_dashboard_endpoint.production_section: PASS - in_progress, scheduled, paused, kits_in_queue, labor_hours_pending, active_runs with progress_pct
ops_dashboard_endpoint.lanes_section: PASS - total_active, avg_utilization, lanes with utilization_pct and status
ops_dashboard_endpoint.delivery_section: PASS - total_routes, total_stops, total_distance_miles, total_delivery_cost, cold_chain_routes
ops_dashboard_endpoint.alerts_section: PASS - alerts array with severity, source, message
ops_dashboard_endpoint.alerts_sorted: PASS - sorted by severity (critical > urgent > warning)

production_pipeline.kpi_cards: PASS - 6/6 cards (In Progress, Scheduled, Paused, Kits in Queue, Produced Today, Pending Labor Hrs)

active_runs.run_cards: PASS - 4 cards with progress bars and status badges

lane_utilization.lane_cards: PASS - 3 cards with utilization bars and status (IDLE)

frontend_tests.subscription_pipeline: PASS - visible with Active Subs count
frontend_tests.all_tabs_present: PASS - 11/11 tabs (ops-center, overview, production, assembly, packaging, subscriptions, distribution, forecasting, margin, safety, routing)

mocked_apis.note: ops-dashboard endpoint is fully implemented with real MongoDB aggregation

production.kits_in_queue: sum of total_kits from active runs
production.labor_hours_pending: sum of est_labor_hours from active runs
production.active_runs: array of up to 10 runs with run_id, name, status, priority, total_kits, kits_produced, progress_pct, est_hours, lane_id

lanes.lanes: array with lane_id, lane_name, lane_type, effective_throughput, bottleneck, assigned_runs, kits_assigned, max_capacity_8h, utilization_pct, status

ops_dashboard_endpoint.alerts: array sorted by severity with severity, source, message

ops_center_tab.active_runs: cards with progress bars, status badges, priority indicators
ops_center_tab.lane_utilization: cards with utilization bars, status (overloaded/busy/available/idle), bottleneck info
ops_center_tab.delivery_pipeline: Routes, Total Stops, Distance, Delivery Cost, Cold Chain routes
ops_center_tab.subscription_pipeline: Active Subs, Meals Next Cycle, by_plan breakdown
